summary.lv: Leaders Group meklē Sales Manager ar 2–3 gadu B2B pārdošanas pieredzi (vēlams software/SaaS/HoReCa), kas pārdos SaaS produktu Baltijas tirgū.
summary.en: Leaders Group is hiring a Sales Manager with 2–3 years of B2B sales experience (preferably software/SaaS/HoReCa) to sell a SaaS product in the Baltics.
